message:
style(workspace): rustfmt sweep + assorted formatting touch-ups across 152 files

Workspace-wide reformat. The vast majority of the diff is pure rustfmt
output: line-wrapping at the 100-col rule, import reordering inside
nested-use blocks, single-expression argument lists collapsed onto one
line, and `assert!(<long>)` chains converted to multi-line form. No
behavioral changes.

Scope (counts approximate):
- ~25 connector source/test files (asana, bitbucket, clickup, discord,
  grafana, hubspot, intercom, linear, matrix, monday, notion, slack,
  webhook-receiver, whatsapp, wolfram, zapier, brave-search).
- ~70 fcp-e2e per-connector compliance test files reformatted in bulk.
- Crates: fcp-bootstrap, fcp-conformance (src + 9 conformance tests),
  fcp-core, fcp-crypto (canonicalize/frost/hpke_seal + metamorphic),
  fcp-host (3 benches + bin + 2 integration tests), fcp-manifest,
  fcp-mesh, fcp-oauth, fcp-raptorq, fcp-registry, fcp-sandbox, fcp-sdk,
  fcp-store, fcp-tailscale, fcp-testkit, fcp-webhook (signature.rs only;
  provider.rs already covered by 8610e871), fwc.
- 10 fuzz/fuzz_targets/*.rs reformatted.
- crates/fcp-conformance/src/vectors/core.rs has a 1-line removal that
  is a stale blank-line cleanup, not a vector deletion.

Net diff: 656 insertions / 706 deletions across 152 files (net -50
lines, mostly from collapsing wrapped expressions onto single lines
where they now fit). No file loses substantive content; the largest
single-file deletion is 43 lines from
crates/fcp-conformance/tests/host_surface_preflight_simulate.rs and is
entirely line-wrap collapse plus import reordering.

Also bundles the live tracking update to .beads/issues.jsonl that the
agent swarm has been writing alongside this work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

@@ -133,19 +133,21 @@ impl fmt::Debug for OAuthError {
             Self::RefreshFailed(message) => f.debug_tuple("RefreshFailed").field(message).finish(),
             Self::TokenExpired(duration) => f.debug_tuple("TokenExpired").field(duration).finish(),
             Self::NoRefreshToken => f.write_str("NoRefreshToken"),
-            Self::InvalidTokenResponse(message) => {
-                f.debug_tuple("InvalidTokenResponse").field(message).finish()

+            Self::InvalidTokenResponse(message) => f

+                .field(message)
+                .finish(),
             Self::EmptyTokenField(field) => f.debug_tuple("EmptyTokenField").field(field).finish(),
             Self::HttpError(message) => f.debug_tuple("HttpError").field(message).finish(),
             Self::JsonError(error) => f.debug_tuple("JsonError").field(error).finish(),
             Self::UrlError(error) => f.debug_tuple("UrlError").field(error).finish(),
             Self::SignatureError(message) => {
                 f.debug_tuple("SignatureError").field(message).finish()
             }
-            Self::UnsupportedProvider(provider) => {

-            }

         }
